use_cases: Image and document uploads with drag-and-drop support
File type and size validation before upload
Image preview generation for visual confirmation
Upload progress tracking for large files
ai_summary: A file upload input component with drag-and-drop functionality, supporting image preview generation, file validation (size and type constraints), upload progress tracking, and clear/reset capabilities. Built with a custom hook for reusable file input logic and Lucide icons for visual feedback.
